scripts.dev: concurrently --names "next,api" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "bash -c 'trap exit INT TERM; while true; do NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 next dev; sleep 2; done'" "bash -c 'trap exit INT TERM; while true; do (cd .. && .venv/bin/uvicorn api.main:app --port 8000 --reload); sleep 2; done'"
